message.reasoning_content:
The user is asking for the product of 17 and 23.
I can calculate this using mental math or standard algorithms.
Method 1: Standard multiplication
  17
x 23
----
  51 (3 * 17)
 340 (20 * 17)
----
 391

Method 2: Algebraic identity $(a+b)(a-b) = a^2 - b^2$
17 * 23 = (20 - 3) * (20 + 3) = $20^2 - 3^2 = 400 - 9 = 391$.

Method 3: Distributive property
17 * 23 = 17 * (20 + 3) = 340 + 51 = 391.
Or
17 * 23 = (10 + 7) * 23 = 230 + 161 = 391.

All methods give the same result: 391.
